details: Automated Splunk forwarder deployments with Ansible across environments.
Built CI/CD pipelines for AI apps (Merlin-AI) using Jenkins and DVC.
Containerized legacy apps (eInvoice CI) with Docker for better scalability.
Migrated GitLab (v8.5 to 10.5) and Icinga2 (v2.6 to 2.8) with Chef automation.
Managed AWS ops using CodeDeploy, ECS, and DMS for deployments & migrations.
